text: 28. TAXES: Subcontractor will pay all  social  security  and  other  taxes  imposed  upon  him  as  an  employer  in  connection  with  the performance of his subcontract, and will furnish evidence, when required by Contractor, showing that all such payments required to be made have been paid. Subcontractor shall pay all local, state and federal taxes in connection with this work, including, but not limited to, any sales tax or value added tax.
